message:
chore: refresh E2E, CI, golden journey, and unit test log artifacts with latest run data

Regenerated all test suite artifacts from a fresh run, updating timestamps,
timing measurements, and run identifiers across 140 files:

- artifacts/ci/runs/synthetic-forensics-test/manifest.json: updated run_id,
  started/finished timestamps
- artifacts/e2e/*.e2e.json (26 files): refreshed ts_utc_unix_ms and minor
  timing deltas (duration_ms, fingerprint_ms, eval_ms) reflecting current
  machine performance
- artifacts/e2e/golden_journeys/*.golden.json (8 files): refreshed timestamps
- artifacts/testing/logs/fj-core/*.json (67 files): updated started_at,
  finished_at, duration_ms from cargo test execution
- artifacts/testing/logs/fj-interpreters/*.json (39 files): same timestamp
  and timing refresh

No behavioral or logic changes — purely artifact regeneration from a clean
test run to keep committed evidence current.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
